summary: Iteration 23 testing completed: All 15 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: RBAC sidebar restrictions (Settings super_admin only, admin-only pages hidden for employees), employee-specific dashboard ('My Dashboard' title, personalized stat cards, quick actions), Tickets page accessible to employees with create functionality, Messages contactable-users API correctly restricts to division/subgroup members, Users page Assignment filter for unassigned users.

sidebar_rbac.super_admin_sees_settings: PASS - Settings link visible for super_admin
sidebar_rbac.admin_no_settings: PASS - Settings link NOT visible for admin (correct)
sidebar_rbac.admin_sees_admin_pages: PASS - Users, Reports, Expenses visible for admin

employee_restricted_sidebar.note: Events visible because employee has role_permissions.events=['read']

stat_cards.status: PASS - All 6 employee-specific stat cards present

quick_actions.status: PASS - All 4 employee quick actions present

tickets_page_employee.navigation: PASS - Employee can navigate to Tickets page
tickets_page_employee.create_ticket_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with title, category, priority, description fields
tickets_page_employee.ticket_creation: PASS - Employee can create ticket without 403 error

messages_contactable_users.admin_behavior: PASS - Admin sees all active users (387 users)
messages_contactable_users.employee_behavior: PASS - Employee sees only division/subgroup members (0 users - only user in Technology division)
messages_contactable_users.restriction_working: PASS - Employee sees fewer contacts than admin

users_page_assignment_filter.filter_present: PASS - Assignment filter visible on Users page
users_page_assignment_filter.unassigned_filter: PASS - Shows 2 unassigned users when filtered
users_page_assignment_filter.unassigned_highlighting: PASS - Unassigned users have amber background (bg-amber-50)

mocked_apis.SMTP_email_notifications: MOCKED - Logs to console instead of sending real emails

seed_data_creation: Test ticket created and deleted during tests (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 23 RBAC features verified working: 1) Settings page restricted to super_admin only - admin and employee cannot see it in sidebar, 2) Employee dashboard shows 'My Dashboard' title with personalized stat cards (My Applications, Pending, Approved, My Training, My Tickets, Notifications) and quick actions (New Application, New Ticket, New Note, New Message), 3) Employee sidebar shows only relevant pages - admin-only pages (BBBEE, Expenses, Reports, Users, Settings) are hidden, 4) Tickets page accessible to employees - they can create tickets via POST /api/tickets without 403 error, 5) Messages contactable-users API correctly restricts employees to division/subgroup members only (test.employee in Technology division sees 0 contacts because they're the only user in that division), 6) Users page has Assignment filter with Unassigned option that shows users without division assignment (2 unassigned users found), 7) Events is visible for employee because they have role_permissions.events=['read'] - this is correct RBAC behavior.
